1.name: [1] Sense the Sin
1.description: This power allows the Baali to see into the soul of his or her victim in order to ferret out said victim's greatest moral weakness.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Pg. 94
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 147
Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 38
Dark Ages Storytellers Companion Pg. 38
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 22
Devil's Due Pg. 144
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 445
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 208

2.name: [2] Fear of the Void Below
2.description: The Baali terrifies a target with feelings of going to Hell.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Pg. 94
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 147
Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 38
Dark Ages Storytellers Companion Pg. 39

Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 208

3.name: [3] Conflagration
3.description: The Baali draws out the destructive essence of the Beyond.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 38
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 23
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 445

4.name: [4] Psychomachia
4.description: The Baali summons an apparition of the victim's greatest fear or trauma.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Pg. 94
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 148
Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 38
Dark Ages Storytellers Companion Pg. 39
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 23-24
Devil's Due Pg. 145

Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 209

5.name: [5] Condemnation
5.description: The Baali places a debilitating curse upon a target.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 39
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 24
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 445
Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 209

6.name: [6] Concordance
6.description: Gain a permanent physical feature of your dark masters. Diabolic Lure: Permanently lower a victim's Road rating. Glimpse the Gulf Beyond: Open a rift to the Beyond that mentally overwhelms a target. Ignore the Searing Flames: Suffer no harm from fire.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 39
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 24-25
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 446

6.name: Concordance
6.description: Gain a permanent physical feature of your dark masters.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 39
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 24-25

6.name: Diabolic Lure
6.description: Permanently lower a victim's Road rating.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 81

6.name: Glimpse the Gulf Beyond
6.description: Open a rift to the Beyond that mentally overwhelms a target.

6.name: Ignore the Searing Flames
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Pg. 64

7.name: [7] Bring the Plague
7.description: Spreads a deadly plague that affect both Mortals and Cainites alike. Infernal Servitor: Summon a demon to serve you. Summon the Herald of Topheth: Create a rift to the Beyond through which something might enter the world. The Re-Embrace: Transform a vampire into a Baali.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 210

7.name: Bring the Plague
7.description: Spreads a deadly plague that affect both Mortals and Cainites alike.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 210

7.name: Infernal Servitor
7.description: Summon a demon to serve you.
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 81

7.name: Summon the Herald of Topheth
7.description: Create a rift to the Beyond through which something might enter the world.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 39
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 446

7.name: The Re-Embrace
7.description: Transform a vampire into a Baali.
references: Lore of the Bloodlines Pg. 17

8.name: [8] Adramelech's Wrath
8.description: Cause a Cainite to burn as if the sun itself were shining upon them. Call Forth the Herald of Hell: Rip a hole through reality to conjure a Demonic Prince which wrecks havoc. Contagion: Soak an entire area in evil, causing violence and hatred to erupt. Unleash Hell's Fury: Cause a Cainite to feel the sun's light no matter what shelter they have.
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 212

9.name: [9] Call the Great Beast/Spew Wide the Pit
alias: Call the Great Beast/Spew Wide the Pit [9]
9.description: Sacrifice oneself that one of the Elder Gods might enter the world.
references: Vampire Storytellers Handbook Pg. 95
Vampire Storytellers Handbook Revised Pg. 40
Laws of the Night: Storytellers Guide Pg. 26
